examples: We don't need to stint ourselves—have some more!
He did a stint abroad early in his career.
While serving a compulsory stint in the military, Nurmi entered a 20-k march carrying a rifle, a cartridge belt, and a knapsack.
Before his Washington stint Sneden saw battle, and had his share of close calls.
And two of that party are in the middle of a stint with the MCC Young Cricketers scheme.
